series_metadata.series_title: Request for a Records Retention Schedule form Legal-26 & Records Inventory Worksheet form Legal-27
series_metadata.series_description: These forms are used for conducting an inventory of an agency''s record series and assisting in the creation or revision in a records retention schedule. These forms request vital information to be used in determining the retention period and disposition of a record. These forms replace General Schedule: GAR-RR-02 for the BWC Series Authorization Number: 18550756 and form ADM 3516.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Scan and shred paper securely. ; Electronic: no longer of administrative value, and
